title: Assistant Store Manager - Spencer's Retail Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Spencer's Retail Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail Holdings Services:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Holdings Services!
